eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Mahoning, OH; at 12:15 PM on JUL 5, 2026 Effective until 3:15 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Mahoning County Alert: The Cloisters in Canfield is being evacuated due to high pressure gas line rupture.  Shelter if needed at Canfield Fire Station 3, 5007 Messerly Rd. Shelter if needed at Canfield Fire Station 3, 5007 Messerly Rd.
